value:
v1.12.1 shipped 2026-04-16 (#74 auto-backup project scope, #75 encrypted roundtrip). v1.12.2 consolidated export/import integrity patch covers #78 (export envelope), #76 (single-file export-all), #77 (transactional multi-section imports via new saveAll), #79 (non-string leaf rejection), #80 (import_max_bytes size cap, default 50 MB).

CURRENT STATE: v1.12.2-beta.1 released 2026-04-16 and soaking. Beta.1 adds #87 (saveAll stamps _meta on import so restored entries aren't [untracked]) on top of beta.0. Install via brew install seabearDEV/ccli/ccli-beta for side-by-side testing.

Next: soak clean → cut stable v1.12.2 → v1.12.x export/import integrity chain done.

Also filed during the beta.0 soak session: #88 (askPassword non-interactive path, v1.13.0 milestone) — out-of-scope enhancement surfaced while flogging encrypted roundtrip. Don't address during 1.12.x.
